Document:
# ШАТТЛ С ОБСЛУЖИВАНИЕМ КЛАССА BOOKWORM
[color=#a4885c]Размер корабля:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Рекомендуемый экипаж:[/color] 1-3
[color=#a4885c]Тип электрогенератора:[/color] Плазма
"A cozy medium-size library for travellers who wish to relax with a book or perhaps a board game."
[italic]Brought to you by BlueBird Starship Design & Construction.[/italic]
